title: Lucid (LCID) beats Q2 revenue estimates with another $1.5 billion injection from Saudi PIF
text: Lucid beat Q2 2024 revenue expectations while announcing another $1.5 billion investment from Saudi Arabia's Public Investment Fund. The additional $1.5 billion from Ayar Third Investment Co provided extended liquidity runway until Q4 2025. Record vehicle deliveries of 2,394 units in Q2 represented 70.5% year-over-year growth. However, the strong delivery growth masked underlying challenges, including pricing pressure that reduced average vehicle prices from $105,000 in Q1 2023 to $88,000 in Q1 2024. The continued reliance on PIF funding and the revenue beat provided temporary market relief, though fundamental profitability concerns remained. Analysts viewed the beat favorably but cautioned that Lucid's path to profitability remained highly uncertain.
